51223.author: cms-tsg-storm
51223.body:
backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51216

#### PR description:

As samples are ready, roll back part of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51151.

#### PR validation:

None. It will be tested by the bot.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Verbatim backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51216 to CMSSW_20_0_X.
51223.title: [20.0.X] re-activate Phase2 HLT timing script, using samples produced in `CMSSW_20_0_0_pre1`

51243.author: makortel
51243.body:
#### PR description:

Backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51159 using the same topic branch

> These read non-RAW input files and are unlikely to be revived in 20_0_X, so they are removed.
>
> I had missed these in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50954.

#### PR validation:

None beyond https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51159

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51159
51243.title: [20_0_X] Remove Run 3 PU GPU workflows
